mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_disease (user_id, disease_id, disease_name, status, start_date, end_date, notes) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{diseaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
update kh_user_disease set
disease_id = null,
disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
disease_name = #{diseaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
notes = #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, disease_id, disease_name, status, start_date, end_date, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_disease where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, user_id, disease_id, disease_name, status, start_date, end_date, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_disease where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by create_time desc
